description: The AI monitors churn signals, engagement decay, and NPS trends overnight — surfacing retention risks before they escalate.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from Einstein, Data Cloud, Snowflake, and Genesys.
The AI forecasts churn probability by segment, scores risk, and models the impact of targeted retention outreach — so you can act before members leave.
From the same conversation, the AI generates retention briefs, builds targeted outreach lists in AgentForce, and schedules re-engagement campaigns.
